synthesis.summary: Dashboard milestone scrutiny validation passed. Both implementation features (detail-modal and confidence-threshold-slider) were reviewed and passed with no blocking issues. All 392 tests pass, lint passes with only minor warnings (7 non-blocking react-refresh warnings). The features are ready for user testing.
synthesis.testCoverage: 392 total tests covering all components including CoverageOverlay (22 tests), Dashboard (23 tests), DetailModal (42 tests), CameraView (27 tests), AppContext (33 tests), ConfidenceThresholdSlider (28 tests), and more.
synthesis.lintStatus: Pass with warnings - 7 react-refresh/only-export-components warnings (non-blocking) and 1 react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warning (non-blocking). No errors.
